title: aerangis engleriana
intro: Aerangis engleriana, also known as the orchid tree or African orchid, is a flowering plant native to tropical Africa. It is a type of epiphytic orchid that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in the treatment of skin conditions and wounds. Traditionally, Aerangis engleriana is prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and it can also be dried and used in various herbal preparations, including capsules and tinctures.
